specs.label: Acres
specs.description: Maximize your application window with rapid charging and high-volume cycles.

specs.label: Application Speed
specs.description: Coupled with a 40-foot spray swath — covering a greater width at a faster speed.

specs.label: Tank
specs.description: High-volume capacity for fewer refills, ensuring non-stop productivity during peak season. Also spreads 26 gallons of solids.

specs.label: + RTK Accuracy
specs.description: Pinpoint ±4 inch precision in all terrain — navigating uneven, muddy, or otherwise inaccessible areas.
